# stamp-oid

> Free AI tool for stamp collectors. Identify, value, and learn about stamps from around the world.

## Pages

- [Home](https://stamp-oid.co.uk/): Home — AI stamp identifier and valuation for collectors

## About

Part of the FeelFamous ecosystem — free AI tools for specialists, collectors, and personal sellers.
Built by Chris P Taylor (Doc Strange). PLUR. World domination through kindness. One ember at a time.
Contact: chris@chrisptee.com
